title: Som Pla Noi
original_title: ส้ม ปลา น้อย
overview: A love triangle story of a woman named Som, who have to choose the loved one between Pla, a rich businessman from Bangkok who love her from the first sight or Noi, a poor farmer who secretly have a crush on her.
